zh.South Kirkby, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾素斯 吉可比
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wentworth於1430年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親John Wentworth36歲，母親Joan de Beaumont59歲。他和Joan Calverley至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1480年享年51歲，埋葬在英國越可爾素斯 吉可比。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wentworth was born in 1430, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Wentworth, was 36 and his mother, Joan de Beaumont, was 59. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Joan Calverley. He died about 1480, at the age of 51, and was buried in South Kirkby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wentworth est né en 1430, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Wentworth, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaumont, avait 59 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Calverley. Il est décédé environ 1480, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à South Kirkby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, Unite: North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Wentworth 1430 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wentworth 36 und seine Mutter Joan de Beaumont 59. Er hatte mit Joan Calverley mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1480 im Alter von 51 Jahren und wurde in South Kirkby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wentworth è nato il nel 1430 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Wentworth, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Beaumont, aveva 59 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Joan Calverley. Morì circa 1480, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a South Kirkby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wentworthが1430年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父John Wentworthは36歳，母Joan de Beaumontは59歳であった。彼はJoan Calverleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1480年に51歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアソウス キルクビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wentworth(이)가 1430년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wentworth(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Beaumont(은)는 59세였다. 그는 Joan Calverley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1480년 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 소우스 커k비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wentworth nasceu em 1430, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wentworth, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaumont, tinha 59 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Joan Calverley. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1480, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em South Kirkby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wentworth родился в 1430 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wentworth было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaumont, 59. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Joan Calverley. Он умер около 1480 г. в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности соут киркби, еркшир, Англия.
